data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Mass customer notification', but the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement is fully covered. While the linked use case describes a scenario involving mass notifications, it does not provide concrete evidence of the implementation or testing of this functionality. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: Mass customer notification functionality is not evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
